name: Potato and Yeast
steps: Peel the potatoes. Boil in salt water until soft.
Roast in oven with oil until golden brown.
In pan heat oil and cook fresh yeast.
Cook till yeast and golden crumbs form.
Once cooked, blend and pass through fine chinois. Dry yeast to the paste and keep the oil.
Heat all the ingredients in a pan and bring to the boil.
Using a stick blender emulsify and pass through fine chinois.
Store in container in the fridge.
Blend in the thermos mix for 3 minutes at 70 degrees.
